title: Understand External Memory & Buffer Slicing
description: Explain how Node.js manages external memory and its relationship to the V8 heap. Identify silent memory leaks caused by small Buffer slices retaining large underlying `ArrayBuffer` references. Implement best practices for managing Buffer slices to prevent memory retention issues.
objectives: Explain how Node.js manages external memory and its relationship to the V8 heap.
Identify silent memory leaks caused by small Buffer slices retaining large underlying `ArrayBuffer` references.
Implement best practices for managing Buffer slices to prevent memory retention issues.
